heroHeadline: Saudi Arabia: 282 Years of Kingdom, Oil, and Reform
heroSubtitle: From the Wahhabi-Saudi alliance of 1744 to MBS's Vision 2030 — tracking the rise of a global power across seven eras of history.
footerNote: Data sourced from official records, major outlets, and institutional analyses. Historical events from established scholarly sources. Contested claims flagged with opposing perspectives.
